$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 9th canonical D14 cycle JSON. 1st canonical instance of idea_upstream_ authoring as a D14 closing cycle (post-codification at cycle 128). New-artifact class with absolute line band 60-90 met at 70.

content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: 70 lines mid-band. New-artifact class with idea_upstream_ prefix per skill_upstream_contribution.md shape: frontmatter (filing_authorization + upstream_target + github_issue) + Problem (with concrete evidence) + Evidence (this campaign) + Proposal (5 codify-and-ship items) + Phase-6 propagation candidates table (7 vaults) + Related upstream candidates (2 sibling ideas) + Adoption discipline.

step_1_capture_state.method: Read 1 existing idea_upstream_ exemplar (idea_upstream_workspace_router_row_discipline.md) to confirm shape; author new file per pattern + content from M5.4 AAR Finding + M5.5 cycles 121+127+128
step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: 1st canonical instance of D14 closing-cycle idea_upstream_ authoring shape. Layered structure: Problem (with concrete-evidence pattern from idea_upstream_workspace_router_row_discipline) + Evidence (this campaign — cycles 121 + 127 + 128 + M5.4 cumulative reduction) + Proposal (5 codification items naming the same 5 sections as the README style guide cycle 128) + Phase-6 propagation candidates table (7 vaults × surface × class × current state × notes) + Related upstream candidates (cross-link to 2 sibling ideas) + Adoption discipline (no retroactive reformat; new forks inherit via template).

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — 2 personas per mission spec §Scope cycle 129 row (OSS Maintainer primary for cross-vault scope; UX Writer secondary for authoring discipline).
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension + Q6 Cross-Vault-Scope (NEW for cycle 129)

persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: Phase-6 propagation candidates table names 7 vaults with surface + class + current state + notes — each vault gets a one-row entry that any future Phase-6 propagator can use as a checklist. 'Adopt at next upstream version bump (post-v2.2 minor release)' is explicit; 'no retroactive reformat' protects existing vault commits; 'new vault forks inherit via template' makes the discipline self-propagating after the upstream ships. Cross-link to 2 sibling ideas (workspace_router_row_discipline + credential_broker_template_inheritance) embeds this idea in the upstream-promotion graph. Score 4.75/5.0.
persona_consensus.ux_writer: Problem section names 4 concrete README-quality drift symptoms (800+ line / agent-onboarding-mixed / inconsistent reduction / inconsistent persona-led structure) before proposing the fix — matches the persona-led structural pattern this idea itself proposes (META: the idea opens with the problem it solves). Evidence-this-campaign section cites M5.4 + M5.5 cycle numbers with line-count deltas — quantified-not-narrative. Proposal-section 5-item numbered list maps 1:1 to the 5 sections of the cycle-128 style guide. Cross-references to 2 sibling upstream-promotion ideas. Maintenance cadence stated. Score 4.5/5.0.

step_3_generate_or_regen.decision: NO image generation — D14 is text-only end-to-end; cycle 129 is new-artifact idea-file authoring. Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%).

step_4_implement.method: 1 Write authoring pass. Zero edits to existing files (purely additive new-artifact).
changes_applied: NEW aDNA.aDNA/how/backlog/idea_upstream_readme_first_contact_pattern.md (70 lines) with frontmatter per skill_upstream_contribution shape (filing_authorization + upstream_target + github_issue: TBD + tags) + Problem (4 README-quality drift symptoms) + Evidence (this campaign — 4 M5.5 + M5.4 data points with line-count quantification) + Proposal (5 codify-and-ship items: content-class taxonomy + persona-led structural pattern + scan-affordance ToC + 5-lens conciseness pass + voice precedents) + Phase-6 propagation candidates (7-row table: lattice-labs + latlab + LatticeAgent.aDNA + LatticeTerminal.aDNA + SiteForge.aDNA + III.aDNA + CanvasForge.aDNA) + Related upstream candidates (wikilinks to idea_upstream_workspace_router_row_discipline + idea_upstream_credential_broker_template_inheritance) + Adoption discipline section (next version bump + no retroactive reformat + new forks inherit via template + Phase-6 operator-discretionary)
lift_precedents_honored: Stripe FIRST-PAGE simplicity: opening Problem paragraph names the drift symptoms in plain language
Rust persona-paths: Phase-6 propagation candidates table routes by vault category (operational + product + platform + forge + framework)
Astro problem-first: Problem section opens the file; Proposal follows; Adoption discipline closes
Linear voice: Evidence section uses quantified-not-narrative discipline (cycle 121: 446 → 368 = 17.5%; cycle 127: 368 → 382 = +14)
avoid_precedents_avoided: Marketing-copy excess: zero adjective-stacking; every claim has line-count or vault-name backing
Categorical-hierarchy-only: 5-item Proposal uses functional groupings (taxonomy / pattern / ToC / pass / precedents) not abstract category trees
IA-fragmentation: 7 sections + cross-references; sibling-link form (wikilinks to 2 other idea_upstream_ files); embeds this idea in upstream-promotion graph
Agent-onboarding-mixed-with-human-onboarding: this idea is human-author-facing (operator who will file the GitHub issue at upstream); references human-facing precedents only

five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_4_clarity_checklist_paragraph_scan: PASS — each paragraph passes (i) noun-strong opener, (ii) one idea per sentence, (iii) imperative-or-declarative voice, (iv) no marketing words, (v) no leading 'In order to' constructions
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_5_reference_collection_scan: PASS — 2 wikilinks (idea_upstream_workspace_router_row_discipline + idea_upstream_credential_broker_template_inheritance) validated against existing files; 7 vault names in Phase-6 propagation table validated against workspace CLAUDE.md project table

step_7_record_iii_result.cycle_outcome_summary: Cycle 129 authors NEW how/backlog/idea_upstream_readme_first_contact_pattern.md (70 lines; within 60-90 band per mission spec line 94). 1st canonical instance of D14 closing-cycle idea_upstream_ authoring shape. Frames the M5.4 AAR Finding (content-class taxonomy) + M5.5 codifications (persona-led structural pattern + scan-affordance ToC + 5-lens conciseness pass) as generalizable across 19+ ecosystem vaults; flags 7 Phase-6 propagation candidates (lattice-labs + latlab + LatticeAgent.aDNA + LatticeTerminal.aDNA + SiteForge.aDNA + III.aDNA + CanvasForge.aDNA). Cross-links to 2 sibling upstream-promotion ideas (workspace_router_row_discipline + credential_broker_template_inheritance). 2/2 personas (OSS Maintainer + UX Writer) score 4.5-4.75/5.0; aggregate 4.625. Astro build N/A. Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%). 9th canonical D14 cycle JSON.
